summary: The dashboard is interactive and public-safe, but 93 source rows still need approved company-count evidence and source metadata before investment-grade use.

checklist.owner: Research operator using approved public/company-registry sources
checklist.required_for: 93 company-universe rows that need approved counts or metadata.
checklist.accepted_format: Completed company-universe-wave-N.csv rows with company_count, source_note, source_url, source_date, and approved_by filled.
checklist.approval_gate: Strict company-universe preflight passes with no missing company_count or approval metadata.
checklist.public_policy: Publish aggregate company-count evidence only; do not publish private enrichment exports.

checklist.owner: Research operator using the published wave CSVs
checklist.required_for: Moving all Galway/Dublin local-area and sector rows from request status to approved status.
checklist.accepted_format: Completed wave CSVs that reconcile to the company export request.
checklist.approval_gate: Each completed wave merges cleanly through the approved-data workflow.
checklist.public_policy: Wave CSVs may stay public while they contain request rows and aggregate evidence only.

checklist.owner: Company registry data owner or source reviewer
checklist.required_for: Company-count baseline checks before approved rows are merged.
checklist.accepted_format: CRO/company evidence CSV plus source URL, source date, and reviewer approval fields.
checklist.approval_gate: Approved company counts reconcile to the company universe before dashboard promotion.
checklist.public_policy: Publish source class, public URL, and aggregate counts only.

checklist.required_for: Keeping advertised-for-sale targets fresh and removing duplicates or irrelevant listings.
checklist.accepted_format: Published sale listing audit with URL, source, observed date, and listing metadata.
checklist.approval_gate: Public sale refresh audit returns status ok and stale or duplicate rows are reviewed.
checklist.public_policy: Public listing metadata and source URLs are publishable; private broker notes are not.

checklist.required_for: Moving rows from sample/incomplete to approved in the dashboard readiness gate.
checklist.accepted_format: source_note, source_url, source_date, approved_by, and validation report references.
checklist.approval_gate: Approved source collection reaches 120 of 120 rows with no placeholder or missing approval fields.
checklist.public_policy: Approval metadata can be published when it identifies source class and reviewer without private personal data.

success_definition: All 120 expected public-source rows are approved.
All company-universe rows have approved company_count evidence and source metadata.
No private enrichment export or personal data is committed or published.
Live dashboard verifier passes with collection_progress_status approved_collection_complete.
